title: Backrooms map maker 3000
description: For creating backrooms maps to scare your friends. No custom dimension included.
body:
This mod is a collection of indestructible blocks intended to be used for the creation of maps inspired by the popular internet creepypasta known as "The Backrooms".

 

BLOCKS:

all blocks in this category have the word "backrooms" before the names listed here.

Wall - a basic art of the classic backrooms wallpaper.

carpet - a carpet.

Ceiling tile - a ceiling tile for the backrooms.

Ceiling light - for lighting up the 'rooms(hummbuzz not included)

noclip carpet - a tile that looks indistinguishable from a normal carpet block. However, as the name implies, you can "noclip" into this block, falling straight through it.

 

ITEMS:

Lasergun - a ranged weapon that shoots extremely strong lasers

Entity 01 spawn egg - a spawn egg for a near unkillable mob that seems to move about randomly.

 

ARMOUR:

Hazmat set - a hazmat suit. Each piece gives a special effect.

 

NOTICE: This mod is strictly for creating maps. None of the blocks in this mod generate naturally, and there is no new dimension.
